title: koeleria dersu
intro: Koeleria dersu, also known as Dersu grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Koeleria dersu include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for the treatment of colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory infections. Koeleria dersu can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support immune function and promote overall health.
